query:
INSERT INTO permissions (code, module, action, name, category, isActive, createdAt) VALUES 
('areas:create', 'areas', 'create', 'Create Areas', 'Facilities', 1, NOW()),
('areas:read', 'areas', 'read', 'View Areas', 'Facilities', 1, NOW()),
('areas:update', 'areas', 'update', 'Update Areas', 'Facilities', 1, NOW()),
('areas:delete', 'areas', 'delete', 'Delete Areas', 'Facilities', 1, NOW());
